---
title: "A3_Report"
format: html
---

# Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(unmarked)
```

# Data

```{r, message=FALSE}
tot_landcover <- read_csv("landcover_total_scotland.csv")

d <- read_csv("250000540.csv")
```

# Part A

## Occupancy Model

### Data Wrangling

```{r}
occ_dat <- d |>
  mutate(site = consecutive_id(x, y)) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = visit, values_from = c(obs, rain, wind)) 

occ_dat <- occ_dat |>
  select(species, x, y, site, 
         obs_1, obs_2, obs_3, obs_4, 
         Urban, Coniferous, Broadleaf, MountainHeathBog, Freshwater,
         rain_1, rain_2, rain_3, rain_4, wind_1, wind_2, wind_3, wind_4)

y_mat <- occ_dat |> 
  select(obs_1, obs_2, obs_3, obs_4) 

site_covs <- occ_dat |>
  select(Urban, Coniferous, Broadleaf, MountainHeathBog, Freshwater)

obs_covs_rain <- occ_dat |>
  select(rain_1, rain_2, rain_3, rain_4)

obs_covs_wind <- occ_dat |>
  select(wind_1, wind_2, wind_3, wind_4)

obs_covs <- list(rain = obs_covs_rain, wind = obs_covs_wind)
```

### Model Code

```{r}
umf <- unmarkedFrameOccu(y = y_mat, # observations
                         siteCovs = site_covs, # site covariates
                         obsCovs = obs_covs) # observation covariates
```
